note: Per-ticker attribution snapshot for new-trade entry. Schema matches trades.json signal_attribution shape. Pin to today's decision; do not regenerate after entering a trade.

300308.SZ.wrongIf_at_capture_e: 1.6T mass production delayed beyond Q3 2026 OR NVDA+MSFT+GOOGL stock prices collectively drop >25% from ATH within 1 quarter (hyperscaler CapEx pullback proxy)
300308.SZ.wrongIf_at_capture_z: 1.6T量产推迟至2026年Q3后，或英伟达/微软/谷歌股价集体较ATH下跌>25%（超大规模CapEx削减代理指标）

002594.SZ.wrongIf_at_capture_e: revenue_growth < -10% for 2 consecutive quarters (tariff impact proxy) OR gross_margin drops below 15% OR earnings_growth < -40%
002594.SZ.wrongIf_at_capture_z: 连续两季度营收增速<-10%（关税冲击代理指标），或毛利率跌破15%，或盈利增速<-40%

175.HK.wrongIf_at_capture_e: [NEEDS_JUNYAN_REVIEW] revenue_growth < -10% for 2 consecutive quarters OR operating_margin < 3% (auto-industry stress proxy) OR EV market-share loss to BYD by >300bp QoQ
175.HK.wrongIf_at_capture_z: [等 Junyan 审核] 连续两季度营收增速<-10%，或经营利润率<3%（车企承压代理指标），或新能源车份额相比比亚迪季度环比下降>300bp

300054.SZ.wrongIf_at_capture_e: 2026H1 CMP-pad revenue YoY < +30% (if disclosed) OR gross margin < 48% OR net profit YoY < +25% (per decision sheet wrong_if)
300054.SZ.wrongIf_at_capture_z: 2026半年报抛光垫收入同比<+30%(如披露),或毛利率<48%,或归母净利同比<+25%(决策书 wrong_if)

603233.SH.wrongIf_at_capture_e: [NEEDS_JUNYAN_REVIEW] same-store sales growth < -5% YoY for 2 consecutive quarters OR operating_margin < 5% OR store-count growth < 5% YoY (expansion runway exhausted proxy)
603233.SH.wrongIf_at_capture_z: [等 Junyan 审核] 连续两季度同店销售增速 < -5%，或经营利润率 < 5%，或门店数同比增速 < 5%（扩张跑道见顶代理指标）

688120.SH.wrongIf_at_capture_e: 2026H1 revenue YoY < +20% OR gross margin < 38% OR non-GAAP net profit YoY < 0 (per decision sheet wrong_if, source-bound to the H1 report)
688120.SH.wrongIf_at_capture_z: 2026半年报营收同比<+20%,或毛利率<38%,或扣非归母净利同比转负(决策书 wrong_if,披露绑定)
